# uptimekuma_notification_jiraservicemanagement (Resource)

Jira Service Management notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_jiraservicemanagement" "example" {
  name      = "Jira Service Management Example"
  is_active = true
  cloud_id  = "your-jsm-cloud-id"
  email     = "you@example.com"
  api_token = "your-jsm-api-token"
  priority  = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) Atlassian API token
- `cloud_id` (String) Atlassian site cloud ID
- `email` (String) Atlassian account email
- `name` (String) Notification name

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `priority` (Number) Alert priority (1-5)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
